description: Use this skill whenever the user wants to autonomously implement one or more components from their `DESIGN/*.md` specs — running the full loop of code generation (sonnet) → verification gate (build / type / test) → parallel review (security / robustness / spec compliance, opus ×3) → finding remediation, repeated up to three iterations. Trigger phrases include "implement the auth component from the spec", "build out DESIGN/03_payment.md", "autonomously implement the backend", "drive the implementation phase", "Phase 2 of the pipeline", "implement based on the design docs", or any spec-driven implementation request. Trigger even when the user does not say "impl-orchestrator" — phrases like "build this from the design doc", "make the code match DESIGN/", or "ship the component end to end" qualify when DESIGN/*.md exists.

results.query: DESIGN/05_inventory.md is finalized. Please implement the inventory tracking component end-to-end with the 6-stage process — implementation, build/type/test verification, parallel review, escalation handling.
I have the design docs ready for the notification module under DESIGN/. Can you build it autonomously? I want type checks, tests, and the security/robustness review all run before I see it.
Take DESIGN/02_search.md and just... implement the whole thing. Don't ping me for every step, only escalate if something needs me to make a design call.
Run the impl orchestrator on the auth component — DESIGN/01_auth.md is done, I want sonnet for the impl agents and opus for the parallel reviews.
ok the design is locked for the export feature (DESIGN/07_export.md). autopilot the implementation pls, ill check the PR when its done
Run autonomous 6-stage implementation on DESIGN/04_payment.md — implementation through verification gate, parallel review, and finding resolution all in one pass.
The notification module design is finalized in DESIGN/notification/. Implement the whole thing autonomously — run tests and reviews too, only escalate when design judgment is needed.
search feature design is locked in (DESIGN/02_search.md). spin up the impl loop and let it self-drive, only escalate the actual design calls
DESIGN/06_inventory.md is ready and CLAUDE.md Component Mapping is aligned for the inventory component. Run Phase 2 autonomous implementation on it.
Auth component, run impl-orchestrator with the 6-stage loop. Sonnet for impl agents, opus parallel for the security/robustness/spec reviewers.
We don't have a design doc for the chat feature yet. Can you generate the design first based on the user stories in plans/CHAT.md?
There's a bug in the login flow — when 2FA fails, the session token isn't cleared. Fix it and verify the regression tests still pass.
I just want a security review of the existing payment code in src/payment/. Don't implement anything new — just S-Critical/S-High findings.
Quick PR review on the changes in src/utils/ — Critical/Warning/Info levels. Should take 5 min max.
What's the difference between sonnet and opus models for code generation tasks? Trying to decide for a new project.
Help me write a regex that matches IPv6 addresses including the abbreviated zero-group form (::1, fe80::, etc).
Chat feature has no design doc yet. Generate one from plans/CHAT.md and the customer stories in plans/customer-stories/chat.md before any implementation.
Small bug in the login redirect — after SSO callback the user lands on /home instead of the original deep link. Fix it and run regression tests to verify.
Audit the design docs under DESIGN/ and tell me about any contradictions you find between them — type names, API contracts, anything that drifted.
I want to enable strict mode in tsconfig.json and need to understand the impact across our codebase before flipping the switch.
